title: struthiopteris remota
intro: Struthiopteris remota, also known as the fern-like plant, is a species of lycopod that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Struthiopteris remota include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin diseases. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties.
